items.question: What does a typical engagement look like?
items.answer: It starts with a free 30-minute discovery call. After that I send a written proposal with scope, timeline, and price. Once approved, I deliver everything via pull request with documentation included.

items.question: Do you work with early-stage startups?
items.answer: Yes — that's my primary focus. I specialise in 1–10 person teams that need production-grade infrastructure without a full-time DevOps hire.

items.question: What cloud providers do you support?
items.answer: AWS is my primary platform, GCP is secondary. I default to cloud-agnostic IaC (Terraform/Pulumi) so you're never locked into a provider. For GCP workloads, I commonly deploy on Cloud Run with managed CI/CD.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Three options: hourly advisory ($150/hr, no minimum), fixed-scope project (from $3,000), or a monthly retainer ($2,000/mo for up to 16 hrs). See the Pricing page for full details.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support after a project?
items.answer: Yes. Every project includes one month of post-delivery email support. For ongoing needs, the retainer option gives you priority access and regular infrastructure reviews.

items.question: Can you work with an existing codebase or cloud setup?
items.answer: Absolutely. Migration and modernisation projects are welcome — I'll audit what you have, identify quick wins, and propose a phased improvement plan.
